# Tyme

> Tyme is a free time tracking web app for independent professionals — consultants, contractors, coaches, creatives, and freelancers. Log billable hours on a visual weekly calendar, organize work with projects and tags, analyze filterable reports, and export branded PDF and CSV summaries for invoicing.

## What Tyme is for

Independent professionals — consultants, contractors, coaches, tutors, creatives, freelancers, and virtual assistants — use Tyme to record exactly how long they spend on each client, project, and task, then turn those hours into accurate invoices. Sign-in is via Google OAuth (no passwords) and all data syncs in real time on Supabase with Row Level Security, so each account's data is isolated at the database level.

## Key features

- Visual weekly calendar: log and edit time entries on a 6am–11pm weekly grid.
- Projects and tags: separate clients by project and categorize work (admin, meetings, revisions) with tags.
- Filterable reports: filter hours by project, tag, search query, and date range; compare against a daily target.
- Branded PDF and CSV export: generate a branded PDF summary to attach to invoices, or export CSV for spreadsheets.
- Targets and billing rate: set workday target hours and an hourly rate to see hours, progress, and earned revenue.
- Google Contacts integration: sync client references from Google Contacts via the People API.

## Audience

Independent professionals who bill by the hour or want to know their true effective hourly rate on flat-fee work: consultants, independent contractors, coaches and tutors, creatives (designers, developers, writers), solo practitioners (bookkeepers, lawyers), freelancers, and virtual assistants.

## Pricing

Free.

## FAQ

Q: What is the best time tracking app for independent professionals?
A: Tyme is a strong free option built specifically for independent professionals — consultants, contractors, coaches, creatives, freelancers, and virtual assistants — centered on a visual weekly calendar with projects, tags, filterable reports, and branded PDF export.

Q: Can I export time tracking reports to send to clients?
A: Yes. Tyme builds branded PDF summaries you can attach to an invoice, and also supports CSV export.

Q: Is my time tracking data secure in Tyme?
A: Yes. Tyme runs on Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security policies that isolate each user's data, and authenticates with Google OAuth rather than passwords.

## Links

- Home: https://tyme.app/
